issues.details: The orchestrator requires .eds-migration/state/samples/ directory with sample JSON files and a samples-summary.json. Neither the directory nor the summary file exists. Only two artifacts are present under .eds-migration/state/: manifest.json and docs/phase1-discovery.md.
issues.remediation: The scraper/analyzer sub-phase must run to produce per-page sample JSON files (one per archetype) in .eds-migration/state/samples/ and a samples-summary.json aggregating them. Re-run the scrape/sample phase before proceeding.

issues.criterion: Archetype count mismatch vs orchestrator expectation
issues.details: The orchestrator note references '8 archetypes from the manifest', but manifest.json contains only 7 distinct archetypes: homepage, locale-root, treatment-page, faq, clinic-finder, legal, contact. The phase1-discovery.md doc mentions 'clinic-detail' as an 8th archetype (dynamic parametrized pages) but it is explicitly excluded from the manifest and has no representative static URL. No sample can be scraped for clinic-detail from the manifest entries.
issues.remediation: Either add a representative clinic-detail URL to the manifest (e.g. a fixed-parameter example) or update the orchestrator expectation to 7 archetypes. Document the exclusion of clinic-detail as a dynamic archetype.

url_spot_check.detail: Checked https://www.juvederm.nl/ (200), https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/treatment/male (200), https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/qa (200) — all return HTTP 200, real content pages

sitemap_cross_check.detail: Sitemap at https://www.juvederm.nl/sitemap.xml has 13 URLs; manifest has 14 (manifest includes /nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker which is absent from sitemap but resolves 200). No truncation detected.

archetype_categorization.detail: Sampled URLs per archetype are coherent: treatment-page URLs all follow /nl/treatment/{area}, clinic-finder groups /find-a-clinic + /clinics + /clinic shell, legal groups disclaimer + T&Cs.

nav_section_coverage.detail: All primary nav sections mapped: Behandelingen→treatment-page, Vragen→faq, Vind je kliniek→clinic-finder, Contact→contact, legal footer links→legal.

priority_assignments.detail: Homepage and locale-root are 'high'; treatment pages are 'high' (appropriate as primary content); faq/contact/find-a-clinic are 'medium'; legal/utility pages are 'low'.

samples_directory.detail: .eds-migration/state/samples/ does not exist. No sample JSON files or samples-summary.json present.

summary: FAIL — samples/ directory and samples-summary.json are missing (scrape sub-phase not yet run); 7 archetypes in manifest vs 8 referenced by orchestrator
